race.comment: CRASH THE PARTY (7) returned in good order with a close-up second at the Gold Coast before not being disgraced in Listed company at Eagle Farm last time out. Ready to peak now third run back and should get a cosy run in transit from gate three. Will appreciate the drop back in grade here. HAD IT ALL (9) placed around this circuit when having her first outing for the new stable and will have come on with that run now under the belt. In the mix. YATTAZOU (12) will find this easier than recent Sydney efforts and is capable of sharp improvement without surprising. WEEKEND SPIRIT (5) returns from a spell. Finished fourth in most recent trial at Doomben. Opened last campaign with an eighth at Sunshine Coast over 1200m. In the mix.
